item.description:
Racing Post @RacingPost · 13min Willie Mullins' Scottish Grand National hope among spate of non-runners at Ayr after heavy rain hits track
https:// racingpost.com/news/raceday-i ntel/scottish-grand-national-2026-live-updates-odds-tips-and-latest-winners-rRmiS9L64y5g/ … 2 888

item.title: RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 27min History was made during the fourth and final session of the Ocala Breeders' Sales (OBS)
item.description: Racing Post @RacingPost · 27min History was made during the fourth and final session of the Ocala Breeders' Sales (OBS) Spring Two-Year-Olds in Training Sale on Friday when a colt from the first crop of unbeaten champion Flightline sold for a record-shattering $10.5 million. De racingpost.com 2 1 1 mil

item.title: tony_calvin: Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 35min BETTING update on hold while the NRs sort themselves out. Three out of Scottish Nationa
item.description: Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 35min BETTING update on hold while the NRs sort themselves out. Three out of Scottish National and Tellherthename is also a NR because of the ground Cita Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 53min TODAY's detailed copy/thoughts on all nine ITV races. For @AKBets. Well over 3,000 words and a complete, updated stats/info section at end, with latest NRs - and a betting/analysis update to come later this morning. If a job is worth doing etc....; https:// tips.akbets.co.uk/tony-calvin-sa turday-stats-info/ … 652

item.title: tony_calvin: Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 44min Here was Monday's follow up on these welfare/education trials. Definitely not races, th
item.description: Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 44min Here was Monday's follow up on these welfare/education trials. Definitely not races, though.... Cita Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 15 abr. Last week's discussion on barrier trials got a lot of interest/debate and we followed it up this week in an eight-minute section on 33-minutes in here, with a National Hunt angle included; https:// youtube.com/watch?v=zdWPOR ZjX7U … 548

Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 45min Think we are going to have to have a third go at this on Monday, so the @BHAHorseracing will listen...how can anyone bet in 2yo races blind is beyond me.... Cita Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 15h This account clearly follows these barrier trials closely. Ziggy's Starshine another one just now at Bath. Evidence is growing that punters need details of these. x.com/ryanOTHx/statu… 751

If a job is worth doing etc....; De tips.akbets.co.uk 4 3 2 1 mil

item.title: tony_calvin: Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 57min Ayr is soft, heavy in places (bit more rain to come), and Newbury good, good to firm in
item.description: Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 57min Ayr is soft, heavy in places (bit more rain to come), and Newbury good, good to firm in places (nice day in store). Think Newbury have played a blinder to get to that state in a tricky week. Minimal watering since Monday and ground punters can deal with. Latest NRs in here, too. Cita Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 2h TODAY's statistics and info for Newbury and Ayr. Going, weather, watering (Ayr changed to soft, heavy in places during racing yesterday and 3mm+ due this morning, so expect more NRs - BHA site is wrong); 1st-time headgear stats, pace maps and trainerform; https:// tips.akbets.co.uk/tony-calvin-sa turday-stats-info/ … 664
